nextRecommendedAction.label: Review thumbnail brief
nextRecommendedAction.reason: The image tool failed twice and the revised creative direction requires human judgment.

healthSignals.summary: Research and script are complete, but thumbnail failure blocks the approval and publishing path.

blockers.title: Thumbnail generation failed
blockers.cause: The connected image tool returned unusable text rendering on two attempts.
blockers.resolution: Approve the revised text-free thumbnail brief before retrying.

tasks.title: Generate thumbnail

recentActivity.message: Human review of the revised thumbnail brief is now the highest-leverage next action.
Revised thumbnail brief routed to Content Lead for approval.
Thumbnail generation blocked after the second unusable result.
Day 1 episode script completed and stored as version 1.

decisions.rationale: Repeated failures reduced confidence; a human-approved change of creative direction is safer than another identical retry.
decisions.effect: Created a human approval gate and marked the mission at risk.

transitions.toast: Approval recorded. Mission health improved to On track.

updates.nextAction: Content Lead reviews the script and production package.

nextRecommendedAction.label: Run theological and quality review
nextRecommendedAction.reason: The thumbnail is complete, so the production package is ready for the required accountable review.

healthSignals.summary: The human approval unblocked production. The complete package is now ready for theological and quality review.

activity.message: Thumbnail generated from the approved creative brief; quality review is now active.
Approved the revised text-free thumbnail brief.

decision.rationale: The text-free direction avoids the image tool's typography failure while preserving a strong visual focal point.
decision.effect: Unblocked thumbnail generation and activated theological and quality review.

transitions.toast: Feedback recorded. The brief is back in revision.

updates.nextAction: Revise the creative brief using the Content Lead's feedback.

nextRecommendedAction.label: Revise thumbnail brief
nextRecommendedAction.reason: The Content Lead requested a clearer focal point before another image-generation attempt.

healthSignals.summary: The human review prevented a weak creative direction from advancing. A focused brief revision is now active.

activity.message: Requested a clearer visual focal point in the thumbnail brief.

decision.rationale: The revised direction is safer technically but does not yet create enough visual hierarchy.
decision.effect: Routed the brief back for revision while keeping the mission at risk.
